situationalContext: Captain Picard is in Engineering, initiating the auto-destruct sequence for the Enterprise.
Commander Riker is in Engineering, concurring with the auto-destruct sequence.

computerReply: Twenty minutes to auto-destruct. Nineteen minutes, fifty seconds
situationalContext: Captain Picard sets the auto-destruct time interval to twenty minutes.

computerReply: Commander Data is on the Bridge.
situationalContext: Captain Picard is in his quarters, asking the Computer to locate Commander Data.

computerReply: Riker, William T. Do you concur?
situationalContext: Captain Picard is on the Bridge, ordering the Computer to abort the auto-destruct sequence.
Commander Riker is on the Bridge, enthusiastically concurring with the auto-destruct cancellation.
userQuery: Yes! Absolutely! I do indeed concur wholeheartedly!
